mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and compress equity valuations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of months where FEDFUNDS increases, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses the threshold, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio < 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand and economic momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >55% of triggered cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in quarterly regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening supply-side capacity and corporate output growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of periods where INDPRO growth accelerates, or the signal fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark in recovery regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Breaching the 200.0 threshold in the consumer price index triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening and margin compression, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 200.0, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment indicates labor market tightening and wage growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) over rolling 4-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects expanding economic activity and corporate earnings potential, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >60% of quarters where GDPC1 growth is positive, or the signal out-of-sample R-squared falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in industrial production signals immediate supply chain disruptions and weakening manufacturing output, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of instances where INDPRO drops below the threshold, or the signal fails to predict direction with accuracy > 55% in contraction periods.
